posts.author: Cochoa020 (Cindy Ochoa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, the unique ID feature has a set 12-digit ID. I’d love to see a state where we can customize this to only have 5 digits, or just something easier to remember. Additionally, it would be great if we could use custom ID keys across all boards. For example, i have a board where all our ticket request live, and the custom key we’ve used for it is “OBO” - so the unique ID in each request looks something like “OBO-043.” However, we cant use this same custom key (OBO) in our other boards as it only allows the custom key to live in one single board. I’ve found a workaround using formulas but it’d be nice to more customizable options in the ID feature.

What are you trying to achieve

Increased customization for Unique IDs.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can already do part of this:

  • Custom prefixes (like OBO-043)

  • Leading zeros

But:

  • It’s board-specific only

  • You can’t reuse the same key across boards

So is the real ask for global IDs across boards, not basic customization?
